title: Enterprise Tag Dictionary Entry
description: JSON Schema for validating tag dictionary entries in the Enterprise Tag Dictionary (u_enterprise_tag_dictionary table). Each entry represents a single tag value within a category, along with its metadata, applicability constraints, and governance requirements. Used by tagDictionaryLookup.js and tagFieldServerValidation.js for server-side validation.

category.description: Tag category this entry belongs to. Must reference an existing category in the enterprise tag taxonomy. Maps to the NSX-T tag scope.

value.description: The tag value. Must be unique within its category. Used as the NSX-T tag value when applied to VMs via the DFW automation pipeline.

nsxTagKey.description: The NSX-T tag scope (key) that this dictionary entry maps to. Typically matches the category name but may differ for legacy or custom mappings.

description.description: Human-readable description of this tag value explaining its purpose and usage context.
examples: Live production workloads serving end users

isActive.description: Whether this tag value is currently active and available for new tag assignments. Deactivated entries remain in the dictionary for historical reference but cannot be assigned to new VMs. The compliance drift scanner flags VMs with deactivated tags.

cardinality.description: Tag cardinality constraint for this category. Single-value categories allow exactly one value per VM; multi-value categories allow multiple concurrent values.

applicableEnvironments.description: List of environments where this tag value may be used. An empty array means the value is applicable to all environments. Used to restrict certain tags (e.g., specific application codes) to specific environments.

applicableTiers.description: List of deployment tiers where this tag value may be used. An empty array means the value is applicable to all tiers.

applicableSites.description: List of deployment sites where this tag value may be used. An empty array means the value is applicable to all sites.

conflictsWith.description: List of tag values in other categories that are mutually exclusive with this value. Enforced by tagFieldServerValidation.js and the u_tag_conflict_rules table.

reason.description: Explanation for why these values conflict.

examples.reason: PCI workloads cannot be placed in Sandbox environment

requiresApproval.description: Whether assigning this tag value to a VM requires additional approval beyond the standard RITM workflow. When true, the approverRole field specifies which role must approve.

approverRole.description: The role or group required to approve assignment of this tag value. Only applicable when requiresApproval is true. Null when no special approval is needed.

retirementDate.description: Planned date when this tag value will be deactivated. Used for proactive migration planning. Null if no retirement is planned.

replacedBy.description: If this tag value is being retired, specifies the replacement value within the same category.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this dictionary entry was created.

createdBy.description: Email address of the user who created this entry.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to this entry.

updatedBy.description: Email address of the user who last updated this entry.

deactivatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this entry was deactivated. Null if the entry is still active.

deactivatedBy.description: Email address of the user who deactivated this entry. Null if the entry is still active.
